data.title: Two-factor Authentication (2FA)
data.description: Provides an additional security layer for user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Supports various authentication apps and SMS-based verification.

data.title: Content Moderation AI
data.description: Employs AI to detect and manage harmful content proactively.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates machine learning algorithms for policy enforcement.

data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Ensures encrypted connections to protect data in transit.
data.technical_spec: Uses strong cryptographic protocols to secure user data traffic.

data.title: Firewall and DDoS Protection
data.description: Implements robust firewalls to safeguard against cyber attacks.
data.technical_spec: Deploys DDoS mitigation strategies and network monitoring.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts periodic security reviews to maintain platform integrity.
data.technical_spec: Engages third-party cybersecurity experts for deep assessments.
